title: Timișoara, Timiș — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Timișoara, Timiș: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Timișoara is a city in Timiș with a population of 319,279. The city where the 1989 Revolution began, known as Little Vienna for its stunning Secessionist architecture, multicultural heritage, and thriving arts scene.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
